summary: Iteration 28 - Tested 10-phase feature update: ticket repricing (3/2/1), welcome credits=5, nav reorder, NextStepSuggestion on 9 tools, SemesterProgress on Dashboard, ToolOutputBar on 7 tools, problem-first descriptions, About page. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All 14 Playwright tests passed.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login - login with test credentials
Backend: POST /api/auth/register - new user gets 5 credits
Backend: POST /api/analytics/pathway - logs pathway event
Backend: POST /api/analytics/error - logs tool error
Backend: POST /api/analytics/session - logs tool session
Backend: POST /api/analytics/checkin - logs checkin
Backend: POST /api/analytics/funnel - logs funnel event
Backend: POST /api/analytics/outcome - logs outcome report
Backend: GET /api/auth/me - returns user info with credits
Backend: GET /api/user/quick-win - returns data for SemesterProgress
Backend: TICKET_COSTS verified (brief-simplifier=3, course-planner=3, scaffolder=3, essay-scorer=2, humaniser=2, rubric-simplifier=2, decoder=2, visualiser=1, planner=1)
Frontend: Landing page shows '5 Welcome Tickets on signup'
Frontend: Login and redirect to dashboard
Frontend: Navigation order correct (Brief Simplifier first, Course Planner second)
Frontend: Dashboard shows SemesterProgress component
Frontend: Credits page shows all 9 tools with correct costs (3/2/1 badges)
Frontend: Credits page has problem-first descriptions (9/9 patterns found)
Frontend: About page renders with heading, photo, footer card
Frontend: About page has mailto link (aaron@simplifii.com.au)
Frontend: About page has external links (website, Diversified Project)
Frontend: Brief Simplifier has TicketCostBar and tool-explainer-btn
Frontend: Rubric Simplifier has TicketCostBar and tool-explainer-btn
Frontend: ToolExplainerModal has problem-first descriptions
Frontend: Saved Outputs page loads correctly
critical_code_review_comments: TICKET_COSTS correctly configured in /app/backend/utils/tickets.py: brief-simplifier=3, course-planner=3, scaffolder=3, essay-scorer=2, humaniser=2, rubric-simplifier=2, decoder=2, visualiser=1, planner=1
Welcome credits=5 correctly set in /app/backend/routes/auth.py for both register (line 29) and OAuth session (line 108)
Navigation order correct in Navigation.js: Brief Simplifier, Course Planner, Rubric Simplifier, Essay Scorer, Humaniser, Scaffolder, Decoder, Visualiser, Planner, My Outputs
Credits page (Credits.js) has toolDirectory with correct costs and problem-first descriptions
About page (About.js) has all required elements: heading, photo, footer card, mailto link, external links
NextStepSuggestion component integrated in all 9 tool pages
ToolOutputBar component integrated in 7 tool output views (RubricSimplifier, EssayScorer, Humaniser, AssessmentScaffolder, HiddenCurriculumDecoder, ConceptVisualiser, ResultsPremium/Brief Simplifier)
ToolExplainerModal has problem-first descriptions for all 9 tools
seed_data_creation: Created test user during signup test (auto-cleanup not needed - unique email)

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real. Stripe is in test mode. Anthropic/Claude via Emergent LLM Key.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 28 complete. All Phase 1-10 features verified: (1) TICKET_COSTS repriced: Brief/Scaffolder/CoursePlanner=3, Essay/Humaniser/Rubric/Decoder=2, Visualiser/Planner=1. (2) Welcome credits=5 on signup. (3) Nav order: Brief Simplifier first, Course Planner second. (4) NextStepSuggestion on all 9 tools. (5) SemesterProgress on Dashboard. (6) ToolOutputBar (Check In, Voice, New) on 7 tool output views. (7) Problem-first descriptions in Credits page and ToolExplainerModal. (8) About page at /about with heading, photo, footer card, mailto link, external links. Test user: test@simplifii.com / test123.
